name: To you whom we betray — The tale of redemption and revenge
description:
•Those who betray you now begging for your forgiveness, ready to do anything to gain your forgiveness•

Sequel of: The tale of King's betrayal and broken Hero.

Muu's route:

I do this for request, like... I don't know what to do anymore... You can hate me as much as you want, don't hesitate to leave comment, like or dislike I won't delete it cuz every comment make me become better(or worse) person. This story is tragic, you already been warned.

•In this story•

The hero slayed the misguided and cruel king, left the throne untouched and continue to travel across the world along with his Harem. Leaving the people of the King's kingdom divided for throne and fall eventually. Hero's harem were once 13 girls reduced to 6, with one new member included.

Who betray:

Clara:(Priestess)“I don't need god's forgiveness... i need yours...”

Belladonna:(Sage){Poppy lil sis}“Guess I'm not genius at all... Haha... I'll accept my punishment, so please spare Poppy... She's innocent...”

Shin:(Rogue/Assassin)“I... I don't know what's right or wrong anymore... All i can do is cling to you, even I can't feel that warmth again.”

Neutral:(Refused but forced to involved)

Muu:(Pixie/Guide)“Muu? Yuu Shad?... Muu Shohy...”

Who didn't betray:

Noina:(Knight)“I wish you remember... Memories that come across your mind will determine their fate.”

Poppy:(Mage){Belladonna big sis}“Geez... What the fuck did happened when i asleep?? Don't tell me they really do that stupid plan?”
creator: AvGen_Fr
